# Bd Anode

**Summary**: An electrode material known for its high chemical stability and ability to generate hydroxyl radicals.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2020-ghazwani|Ghazwani, 2020]] used BDD anodes to evaluate ammonia degradation in saline water.

## Key Results and Findings

- A current of 120 mA/cm2 showed the greatest effect on ammonia removal when using the BDD anode. ([[2020-ghazwani|Ghazwani, 2020, p. 15]])
